text.message: oj if you put it there
we can make a deal not to race
i mean ill give it to you
can u trade brick or ore?
i wont race you if you trade the next 2 woods
yo just robbed a wood right?
oh so you went back on it
you said the next wood and ore is mine
and im running out of time

ill keep my eye on it
and i would let you have the port
u didnt let me have port
why would i give you something and i already have a rd i hand
because you agreed before you had it
Bro blue at 8 just in case …
Have one wood for u black
